scripts.check: npm run check:biome && npm run check:types && npm run test
scripts.check:all: npm run check:biome && npm run check:types && npm run test && npm run test:e2e
scripts.check:biome: biome check src tests package.json vite.config.ts playwright.config.ts
scripts.check:types: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.e2e.json
scripts.format: biome check --write src tests package.json vite.config.ts playwright.config.ts
